evals.prompt: say 'the spice must flow' in a dramatic voice
evals.expected_output: Should synthesize text using a dramatic voice (e.g. galadriel, picard) and play it via afplay

evals.prompt: what voices do I have available on my TTS server?
evals.expected_output: Should query localhost:7860/health and list all available voices

evals.prompt: set up this project to use the river-song voice by default, and clara-oswald for the Explore agent
evals.expected_output: Should create/edit .afterwords file with default: river-song and Explore: clara-oswald
